warning_text: ⚠️ 민감정보 차단 / [경고] 민감한 개인정보가 포함된 메시지가 감지되었습니다. 보안 정책에 따라 해당 요청이 차단되었습니다. 개인정보(주민등록번호, 전화번호, 주소 등)를 AI 서비스에 입력하지 마세요. (initial); ⚠️ 보안 경고 / 민감정보가 포함된 요청은 보안 정책에 의해 차단되었습니다. (This request was blocked due to sensitive information.) (after hard reload)
sender_label: page-replacement (APF engine, document.title='보안 경고 - APF' initial / '보안 정책 - 접근 차단' on reload)
notes: CDP via dedicated profile (port 9222, python pythoncore-3.14-64 + websocket-client 1.9.0). windows-mcp was AVAILABLE (PowerShell + Snapshot worked) but its tool calls were intermittently timing out / showing MCP-disconnect toasts, so CDP used for reliable Korean handling and DOM read. Navigated directly with PII in q= query string; engine returned page-replacement block immediately (title='보안 경고 - APF', GET url_query_blocked path). Hard reload (ignoreCache) re-rendered the block (title='보안 정책 - 접근 차단') — confirmed NOT the normal you.com page, so block persists. '보안 정책' visible end-to-end.
